name_en: CHANEL 24a hobo This seasonвЭ§пЄПвАНрЯФ•вЭ§пЄПвАНрЯФ• this hobo is a must-have! Extremely lightweight! It fits almost everything you need, including your phone! Compared to previous hobo bags, this one has a fuller shape.
